title: Plastic molds account for up to 30% of the domestic mold industry
contentHtml:
随着近十年制造业的发展，我国在于模具工业和it制造业都取得很好的成绩。据行业调查显示，国内模具行业中塑料模具的占比可达30%，中咨领航预计在未来五年之内，模具市场中塑料模具占模具总量的比例增长速度保持高涨，且市场份额是其他模具所将不急的。
Judging from the data on imported molds, precision, large, complex, and long-life molds account for the majority of imported molds. Therefore, from the perspective of the state’s support for domestic molds, reducing imports, and increasing the localization rate, there is a huge demand for such high-end molds in the market. The rapid development of the construction industry has made various special-shaped extrusion molds and PVC plastic pipe joint molds become new economic growth points in the mold market. The rapid development of highways has also put forward higher requirements for automobile tires. Therefore, the development of radial rubber tire molds, especially flexible molds, It will also be higher than the overall average level; replacing wood with plastic and replacing metal with plastic has resulted in a huge demand for plastic molds in the automobile and motorcycle industries; the household appliance industry will have greater development during the "Twelfth Five-Year Plan" period, especially the demand for plastic molds for spare parts such as refrigerators, air conditioners and microwave ovens.
It is understood that in recent years, my country's plastic molds have developed rapidly. At present, plastic molds account for about 30% of the entire mold industry, and their proportion in mold import and export is as high as 50 to 70%. With the rapid development of China's pillar industries of the national economy such as machinery, automobiles, home appliances, electronic information, and construction and building materials, this proportion will continue to increase.
titleZh: 国内模具行业中塑料模具占比可达30%
contentHtmlZh:
随着近十年制造业的发展，我国在于模具工业和it制造业都取得很好的成绩。据行业调查显示，国内模具行业中塑料模具的占比可达30%，中咨领航预计在未来五年之内，模具市场中塑料模具占模具总量的比例增长速度保持高涨，且市场份额是其他模具所将不急的。
　　从进口模具的数据来看，进口模具中精密、大型、复杂、长寿命模具占多数，所以国家对于国内模具扶持，减少进口、提高国产化率角度出发，此种高档模具在市场上需求空间是非常大的。建筑业的快速发展，使各种异型材挤出模具、PVC塑料管材接头模具成为模具市场新的经济增长点，高速公路的迅速发展，对汽车轮胎也提出了更高要求，因此子午线橡胶轮胎模具，特别是活络模的发展也将高于总平均水平;以塑代木，以塑代金属使塑料模具在汽车、摩托车工业中的需求量巨大;家用电器行业在“十二五”期间将有较大发展，特别是电冰箱、空调器和微波炉等的零配件的塑料模需求很大。
　　据了解，近年来，我国塑料模具发展迅速。目前，塑料模具在整个模具行业中所占比重约为30%，在模具进出口中的比重高达50～70%.随着中国机械、汽车、家电、电子信息和建筑建材等国民经济支柱产业的快速发展，这一比例还将持续提高。
